title: BDL Trade Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 33 Posts
short_info: BDL Apprenticeship 2026 is open to ITI-passed candidates for 8 engineering trades at the Kanchanbagh, Hyderabad unit on a one-year training basis under the Apprentices Act, 1961.

qualification.details: For General/Unreserved candidates, the age must be not less than 14 years and not more than 30 years as on 01.06.2026. | Age relaxation is available as follows: | Candidates must have passed 10th Class / SSC and hold an ITI certificate (passed) in the relevant trade. The essential qualification is the same for all 8 trades. | Important: Engineering Graduates and Diploma holders are NOT eligible to apply for this ITI Apprenticeship. A separate apprenticeship scheme exists for them.

salary_details.details: There is no fixed salary for BDL Trade Apprentices 2026. Selected candidates will receive a stipend as per the rates prescribed under the Apprentices Act, 1961 by the Central Apprenticeship Council during the training period. The stipend rates are determined by the Government of India and are subject to revision from time to time.

selection_process: Selection for BDL Trade Apprenticeship 2026 is purely merit-based - there is no written exam or interview. The merit list will be prepared trade-wise based on marks obtained in the qualifying examinations.
The merit score is calculated using the formula:
Merit Score = (Total Marks Obtained / Maximum Marks) × 100

Equal weightage (50:50) is given to marks obtained in 10th Class / SSC and ITI while preparing the common merit list for each trade. Separate merit lists will be prepared for each trade. Reservation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/CAP/EWS will be applicable as per the Apprentices Act
how_to_apply: Candidates must complete both online registration AND send a hard copy by post. Follow these steps:
Visit the Apprenticeship India portal at https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/candidate-registration and register as an apprentice candidate.
Search for the establishment - select "Bharat Dynamics Limited, Kanchanbagh, Hyderabad (Reg. No. E05203600393)" under "Establishment Search" in Apprenticeship Opportunities.
Fill in your name and date of birth exactly as per your Aadhaar Card, which must also match your 10th/SSC certificate. Correct any discrepancies before the registration deadline.
